title: Window Seat
content: When checking in online, Lily chose a window seat for her flight. She loved watching the world from above and never missed an opportunity to sit by the window. After takeoff, she looked down at rivers, roads, and tiny buildings far below. Later, the plane flew above a layer of white clouds that stretched endlessly across the sky. Lily spent much of the journey taking photographs and admiring the view. Although the flight lasted several hours, she never became bored. For her, the scenery outside was better than any movie.
